title: olearia strigosa
intro: Olearia strigosa, also known as the prickly tree daisy, is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its greyish leaves and white or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia strigosa include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from colds and flu due to its expectorant properties. Olearia strigosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
